header: Terms of service, in plain English
intro: The short version of the agreement you accept by using our platform. The full legal text always takes precedence.

items.title: Your account
items.summary: You are responsible for activity under your login. Keep your password secure and tell us right away if you suspect misuse.

items.title: Billing and cancellation
items.summary: Plans renew automatically. Cancel anytime from billing settings and keep access until the end of the paid period. No partial refunds.

items.title: Your data
items.summary: You own the content you upload. We process it only to run the service and never sell it to third parties.

items.title: Acceptable use
items.summary: Do not use the platform for unlawful, abusive, or infringing activity. We may suspend accounts that break these rules.

items.title: Liability
items.summary: We provide the service as-is and limit our liability to the fees you paid in the prior twelve months, where the law allows.
